name: Suzanne Vega
abstract: Suzanne Nadine Vega (née Peck; born July 11, 1959) is an American singer-songwriter of folk-inspired music. Vega's music career spans 40 years.

concerts.label: Music for Youth Benefit Concert: The Music of Joni Mitchell
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I did an album for Suzanne Vega several years ago... we blended. The great thing is that I went in and our voices blended. It was great to be able to sing with her.
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018
